meaning: n.[宗]执事长(教会中神职人员的一种职位)
examples: The archdeacon had truly expressed the workings of his mind .
The archdeacon thinks that such a correspondence is disgraceful.
All this she attributed to the prejudice and conceit of the archdeacon.
When the archdeacon caught bunches of kids running around unattended, Lance was asked to leave.
Bishop Gledhill said historically the archdeacon's role related primarily to the property side of churches.
